chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1935 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3976/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on statement dated 24.06.2025. 4.For orders on CMA 7232/24 5.For orders on CMA 7233/24 6.For hearing of main case 01-07-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner. ****** 1. Per office note, this matter is already fixed on 09.09.2025; however, learned counsel pleads urgency on the ground that purpose of petition has been served, hence petitioner has filed statement dated 24.06.2025, whereby seeks withdrawal of instant petition. He, therefore, submits that by granting this application, it may be converted into an application for antedating the case and matter may be taken up in Court today for hearing. Record supports his contentions. Ordered accordingly. 2to6. In view of above, this petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
